name: ozon-rust-suite-local

tools.name: ozon.products.count
tools.description: Count products through the configured connector; real mode uses saved Ozon Seller API credentials.

tools.name: ozon.products.list
tools.description: List product summaries with a bounded limit; real mode returns official Ozon Seller API data.

tools.name: ozon.products.get
tools.description: Read one product fact pack with stable Ozon details, attributes, and image URLs.

safety_rules: OpenClaw can propose tasks but cannot approve or execute write tasks.
Every write operation is dry-run first and must be approved in the local UI.
The mock executor never sends real Ozon write requests.
The local skill API must bind to 127.0.0.1 and require x-openclaw-token for bridge calls.
Operator-only actions require x-local-token and are not exposed as OpenClaw tools.
OpenClaw may propose a read-only schedule, but cannot enable, disable, or run it.
Scheduled e-commerce reads use official Ozon seller APIs only; no captcha bypass, anti-bot bypass, or live 1688 scraping.
